subject: [PATCH v4 03/10] fuse: refactor io-uring header copying from ring

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch refactors the logic for copying headers from a ring in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) io-uring implementation. It extracts this logic into a new function called copy_header_from_ring(), making it clearer and more centralized, and also improves error handling and logging.
